raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "wiſſi Laudis gahje pahri: Un tas
Rehniſsch gahje pahr to Uppi Riḣ-
dranu/ ir wiſſi Laudis gahje pah-
ri us to Zettu/ kas us Tukfne-
fi teḱ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un raugt/ Zadaks bija ar-
ri tur ar wiſſem Lewiteem/ kas
to Deewa Derrbas Schkirstu
neſſe/ un tee noltſke to Deewa
Schkirstu. Un Abjatars pakah-
pahs (kur)/ teekans wiſſi Lau-
dis bij beignſchino Pilsfahta iſeet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tas Rehninſch
us Zadaku: Neſs to Deewa
Schkirstu akkat Pilsfahtā. Ja es
Schehlastibu atradditſchu preeſſch
ta KUNGA/ tad weddihs wiſch
man atpakat/ un liks man to
redſeht ar winna Dshwoklt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ja wiſch ta fazzihſ:
Man tewis ne griḃbahs/ reds/
fche eſinn es/ lui wiſch man dar-
ra/ ka tas winnam labbi patibē.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wehl fazzija tas Rehninſch
us to Preesteri Zadakn: Neggi
tn eſſi weens Redsetajs? Etj at-
pakat us Pilsfahtn ar Meeru/
ir juhſu diwi Dehti ar junis/ A-
kimāāz taws Dehls/ un Jona-
tans Abjatarra Dehls.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Raugajt/ es pagatidſchu
Tukfneſes Klaijunōs/ teekans
kahda Wehsts no junis nahks/
un man Sinnu dohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta neſſe Zadaks un Ab-
jatars to Deewa Schkirstu atkat
us Jeruſalemi/ un palikke tur.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Dahwids kahpe usto
Etjes-Kalnu/ eedams un randā-
dams/ un bij fawn Galwu ap-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "tinnis/ un gahje pats baṙahm
Rahjahm/ ir no teem Laudun
kas pee winna bija/ bij ikkatrs fa-
wu Galwn aptinnis/ un uskahp
eedami un raudadami.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Dahwidain tappe stah-
stihts un fazzihſs: Akitowels ir
starp teem/ kas ar Absalomu fa-
derrejschees/ tad fazzija Dah-
wids: KUNGS/ darri jelle Aki-
toweka Padohmu par Gefkibun
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad nu Dahwids us ang-
schu nahze/ ka wiſsch tur Dee-
wu luḣgtu/ raugi/tad nahze wi-
nam Usajus tas Arkiteris prett
ar faplohsiteem Swahrkeem/ un
bij Semmi us fawn Galwu
mettis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Dahwids fazzija us
to: Ja tu ar mannim eefi proh-
jam/tad buhſi tu man parNastu
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ja tu atkat Pilsfah-
tā ceti/ un fazzift us Absale mu
Es eſmu taws Kalps/ es griḃbu
tam Rehutnam peederreht/ ka ee-
zittkahrt tawa Tehwa Kalps biju-
bet no fchi Laika un nu buhſch-
es taws Kalps/ tad isnthzinat-
tu man Akitoweka Padohmu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Negg arri tur pee tei-
buhś tee Preesteri Zadaks un Ab-
jatars? tapehz wiſſas tahs Lee-
tas/ ko tu Rehnina Namma-
dsirdefi/ warrefi tu teem Pre-
sterem Zadakam un Abjataran
stahstiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Redsi/ tur irr winnu dt
wi Dehti Akimāāz Zadaka/ un
Jonatans Abjatarra Dehls/ zau-
teem warrefet juhs wiſſas Lee-
tas
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
